rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption reduces taxable property values, which affects the denominator (Current Total Value - New Property Value) in the §26.0443 rate-adjustment formulas, indirectly altering computed rate increases for eligible county hospital expenditures.
quote: (Current Tax Year's Eligible County Hospital Expenditures - Preceding Tax Year's Eligible County Hospital Expenditures) / (Current Total Value - New Property Value)
_note: Indirect interaction: proposed change alters inputs to the §26.0443 formula but does not require amendment to the statute itself; implementing agencies must account for reduced taxable values in rate calculations.
